userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: Stores user progress, completion trackers, challenge status, and adapted plan variations on the cloud.

completedDays.description: List of day numbers completed by the student.

challengeCompletions.description: List of day numbers where challenge tasks were conquered.

userNotes.description: Key-value pair mapping day numbers to personal notes strings.

isAdapted.description: Flag showing whether the study plan has been dynamically adapted by the AI assistant.

currentDayIndex.description: The current active study day index (1-30).

adaptedPlan.description: Customized restructured daily tasks and topics list if isAdapted is true.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the logged-in student.

email.description: The email address of the logged-in student.

/users/{userId}.description: Main document for each student's persistent study progress state, structured under their individual authenticated user identifier.
